decision.reason: The certified projection has a 297-dimensional quotient, a retained 44,224-dimensional kernel, a chosen section, and certified kernel-obstructed operations. This supports the rolewise reflection, not a public inverse or a standalone global separation theorem.

derivative_reflection.np_x_side_role: NP witness/X extractor access is hidden fiber or kernel-sensitive dynamics
derivative_reflection.p_side_role: public-P/C trace access is quotient-visible boundary dynamics
derivative_reflection.statement: Quotient and kernel are complementary first-order readings of the same boundary map: the quotient records public surface variation, while the kernel records hidden fiber directions erased by that surface reading.

next_highest_yield_item.action: Promote the ball/surface/raw-tensor dialectical bridge into an adjacent certificate that names surface, filling, tensor substrate, transport, and residue return roles.

non_claims: This does not prove a literal P != NP iff T985 equivalence.
This does not make the section canonical evidence that the quotient contains the full kernel.
This does not claim every possible polynomial-time computation has been formalized in a proof assistant.
This does not replace the full no-escape closure ledger or external audit pack.

canonical_section_is_only_a_chosen_retur.needed: A right inverse P*S=I on the quotient, recorded as a chosen representative lift rather than a kernel collapse.

evidence.kernel_descent_test: A tube-pair operation Phi descends through P:TubePair->Loop iff P Phi = R P for some quotient operator R; equivalently Phi(ker P) is contained in ker P. This verifier checks A == (A S) P on each source/target base block using the certified section S.

descent_distinguishes_kernel_respecting_.needed: A certified test showing which operations descend through the quotient and which remain section-dependent.

drinfeld_boundary_agrees_with_projection.needed: Independent boundary-layer agreement on quotient dimension, kernel dimension, and section identity.

global_iff_is_not_inserted.needed: The rolewise quotient/kernel certificate must not silently assert the blocked literal equivalence.

kernel_retained_as_hidden_fiber.needed: A nonzero retained projection kernel, not an erased or silently collapsed fiber.

projection_surjects_to_public_loop_quoti.needed: A certified quotient map from full tube-pair data to the public closed-loop quotient.

x_policy_decision.reason: The explicit sector-33 extractor exists at family scope, but the formal policy keeps it on the X surface. Public-P executions compile to C-only traces; V is public-certificate surface; X is oracle/advice/extractor surface.

public_p_excludes_hidden_x_recovery.needed: A policy boundary keeping hidden-sector extractor/fiber access outside public-P computation.
